description: Bank North compliance agent. Provides grounded regulatory guidance (KYC, AML, sanctions, fraud, eligibility) and escalation, offered cross-org to Bank South over A2A.

skills.name: Regulatory Guidance
skills.description: Answer KYC/AML/sanctions/eligibility questions with cited rules from the compliance knowledge base.

skills.name: Escalation Handling
skills.description: Recognise advice requests and high-risk cases and route them to the correct human per the escalation matrix.
